message:
I am thinking...: I have created all the necessary files for the restaurant management application as per the requirements. I should now verify the project structure and ensure everything is in place. Since I have already created all the files, I will perform a final check of the file list to ensure nothing is missing.

2. tsconfig.json

4. prisma/schema.prisma
5. src/app/layout.tsx

20. src/components/OrderTable.tsx

22. .env.example
23. src/lib/prisma.ts
24. src/lib/auth.ts

Everything seems to be in place. I will now signal completion.
